items.name: Pulled Pork
items.description: Slow-smoked pork shoulder, hand-pulled

items.name: Smoked Brisket
items.description: 12-hour smoked beef brisket,sliced

items.name: Sticky Ribs Platter
items.description: A half-slab of competition-style St. Louis pork ribs, rubbed with a brown-sugar spice blend, slow-smoked over hickory wood until competition-tender, and glazed with a sweet, sticky Kansas City-style BBQ sauce.

items.name: Smoked Chicken
items.description: A whole half-chicken brined for 24 hours, rubbed with a sweet-heat chipotle blend, and pit-smoked until incredibly juicy. It's finished on the grill with a sticky, caramelized glaze of local hot honey and apple cider vinegar.

items.name: Cajun Flame-Grilled Shrimp Skewers
items.description: Jumbo, tail-on shrimp marinated in a zesty garlic-herb butter and heavily dusted with Cajun blackening spices. Seared over open flames for a perfect char and served with a side of charred lemon and a cool, creamy remoulade dipping sauce.

items.name: Mac & Cheese
items.description: Creamy baked mac and cheese

items.name: Salad
items.description: flavourfull salad

items.name: Apple-Cider Crisp Slaw
items.description: A crunchy, refreshing mix of shredded green and red cabbage, julienned carrots, and crisp Granny Smith apples, tossed in a tangy, house-made apple cider vinegar dressing (no heavy mayo here!).

items.name: Bourbon & Brown Sugar Pit Beans
items.description: A hearty blend of navy and pinto beans slow-simmered with smoky bacon pieces, molasses, dark brown sugar, and a splash of Kentucky bourbon, cooked directly under the smoker to catch the meat drippings.

items.name: Honey-Butter Skillet Cornbread
items.description: A thick, moist wedge of sweet golden cornbread baked fresh daily, served warm with a generous scoop of whipped honey-cinnamon butter.

items.name: Brownies
items.description: delicious brownies with vanilla ice cream

items.name: Southern Style Banana Pudding
items.description: Layers of silky vanilla bean custard, fresh sliced bananas, and fluffy whipped cream, stacked high with classic Nilla Wafers that get perfectly cake-like overnight. Served in a nostalgic mason jar.

items.name: Cast-Iron Peach & Bourbon Cobbler
items.description: Sweet, juicy peaches simmered with brown sugar, cinnamon, and a splash of bourbon, baked under a golden, flaky brown-sugar biscuit crust. Served warm in a skillet.

items.name: Key Lime Pie Bars
items.description: A silky, tart, and wildly refreshing authentic key lime custard baked over a thick, buttery graham cracker crust. Served chilled with a dollop of fresh whipped cream and a lime twist to perfectly cut through heavy BBQ smoke.

items.name: Campfire S'mores Dip
items.description: A cast-iron skillet loaded with melted milk chocolate chips and peanut butter chunks, topped with a dense layer of jumbo marshmallows, baked until toasted and golden brown. Served hot with a basket of graham crackers for dipping.

items.name: Iced Tea
items.description: lemmon flavoured delicious ice tea

items.name: Beer
items.description: ice cold beer

items.name: Club Soda
items.description: ice cold club soda

items.name: Chocolate MilkShake
items.description: ice cold chocolate milkshake

items.name: Energy Drink
items.description: red bull ice cold energy drink
